chunks.label: A
lines: I am the very model of a modern Major-General,
I've information vegetable, animal, and mineral,

chunks.label: B
lines: I know the kings of England, and I quote the fights historical,
From Marathon to Waterloo, in order categorical;

chunks.label: C
lines: I'm very well acquainted, too, with matters mathematical,
I understand equations, both the simple and quadratical,

chunks.label: D
lines: About binomial theorem I'm teeming with a lot o' news,
With many cheerful facts about the square of the hypotenuse.
